quality_highlights: memoryops.md: excellent numbered-pattern structure, real-world workflow references, concrete JSON state examples, and security guidance
engine_validation.go: outstanding error messages with fuzzy suggestions, inline YAML examples, and doc links on every error path

single_file_improvements.issue: Title 'GitHub Tools Read Permissions' is misleading — the page covers the full permissions model including write ops (id-token:write, safe-outputs). Enterprise users scanning the sidebar may miss this page when searching for general permissions guidance.
run-failure message has no actionable guidance. Success message says 'Review the report and react with ✅ or ❌' but failure message just reports status with no next-step instructions.
